description: API_GATEWAY specification requires exclusive modification access
DATABASE migration requires exclusive schema change access
STAGING_ENV deployment pipeline requires exclusive deployment access
BACKEND_B depends on BACKEND_A: Service A must be deployed and registered before Service B can be tested
FRONTEND_DEV depends on both services being ready
DATABASE schema must be ready before both BACKEND_A and BACKEND_B can implement
REVIEWER must approve code for each service before deployment
New service version must be registered before old version is decommissioned
Deployment succeeds or fails; failure triggers DEV_OPS rollback alert to all affected developers
API spec conflict between BACKEND_A and BACKEND_B must be resolved before proceeding
REVIEWER approves or requests changes for each service
Service dependency ordering: Service A deployed before Service B, both before FRONTEND_DEV
DB migration -> service implementation -> review -> test -> deploy -> register (per service pipeline)
Both BACKEND_A and BACKEND_B and FRONTEND_DEV need API_GATEWAY to modify specification; DEV_OPS needs API_GATEWAY to register services
API spec contention: BACKEND_A and BACKEND_B both need to modify the shared API spec, creating mutual blocking
Rollback cascade: failed deployment of Service A triggers rollback, but Service B already started testing against A, requiring B to also roll back
